articles.title_en: Russian Economy Shrinks in the First Quarter
articles.lead_en: The 0.5% contraction in GDP significantly missed the Central Bank’s earlier projection of 1.6% annualized growth for the period.
articles.title_raw: Russian Economy Shrinks in the First Quarter
articles.lead_raw: The 0.5% contraction in GDP significantly missed the Central Bank’s earlier projection of 1.6% annualized growth for the period.

articles.title_en: The Central Bank noted signs of revival of business activity in the Russian economy in March and April
articles.lead_en: Domestic demand in the future can be supported, in particular, by the continued high rates of increase in household incomes, the Bank of Russia noted.
articles.title_raw: ЦБ отметил признаки оживления деловой активности в экономике РФ в марте и апреле
articles.lead_raw: Поддержку внутреннему спросу в дальнейшем могут оказывать, в частности, сохраняющиеся высокие темпы увеличения доходов населения, отметили в Банке России

articles.title_en: The Central Bank estimated inflation in Russia at the end of the first quarter at 5.9%
articles.lead_en: At the same time, annual inflation will drop to 4.5-5.5%, the Bank of Russia noted.
articles.title_raw: ЦБ оценил инфляцию в России на конец I квартала в 5,9%
articles.lead_raw: При этом годовая инфляция снизится до 4,5-5,5%, отметили в Банке России

articles.title_en: Dmitriev suggests hantavirus outbreak could be used to justify energy restrictions
articles.lead_en: The Russian presidential special representative for investment and economic cooperation commented on a report saying that Swiss authorities are urgently tracing contacts of a man hospitalized in Zurich with a strain of hantavirus capable of human-to-human transmission
articles.title_raw: Dmitriev suggests hantavirus outbreak could be used to justify energy restrictions
articles.lead_raw: The Russian presidential special representative for investment and economic cooperation commented on a report saying that Swiss authorities are urgently tracing contacts of a man hospitalized in Zurich with a strain of hantavirus capable of human-to-human transmission

articles.title_en: Russia’s economy slows as war costs mount, budget deficit widens, and rate cuts near their limit
articles.lead_en: Five years into the full-scale war, the Russian economy has accumulated serious systemic problems. But that still does not mean it will collapse tomorrow: degradation takes time, and many of the mines that have been laid are slow to detonate.
articles.title_raw: Russia’s economy slows as war costs mount, budget deficit widens, and rate cuts near their limit
articles.lead_raw: Five years into the full-scale war, the Russian economy has accumulated serious systemic problems. But that still does not mean it will collapse tomorrow: degradation takes time, and many of the mines that have been laid are slow to detonate.

articles.title_en: Bank of Russia reiterates its efforts to ensure consistently low inflation
articles.lead_en: According to the regulator, high inflation indicates that the economy is growing beyond its capacity, essentially "to the point of exhaustion," using up its available production and labor resources
articles.title_raw: Bank of Russia reiterates its efforts to ensure consistently low inflation
articles.lead_raw: According to the regulator, high inflation indicates that the economy is growing beyond its capacity, essentially "to the point of exhaustion," using up its available production and labor resources

articles.title_en: Novak instructed the Ministry of Labor to deeply analyze the situation on the labor market
articles.lead_en: The Deputy Prime Minister of the Russian Federation noted the importance of constant monitoring of key macroeconomic and sectoral indicators to develop timely and operational decisions
articles.title_raw: Новак поручил Минтруду глубже проанализировать ситуацию на рынке труда
articles.lead_raw: Вице-премьер РФ отметил важность постоянного мониторинга ключевых макроэкономических и отраслевых индикаторов для выработки своевременных и оперативных решений

articles.title_en: The Central Bank is working for sustainable economic growth, striving to ensure low inflation
articles.lead_en: A high level of inflation indicates that the economy is developing too quickly, using its production and labor resources to the limit, notes the Bank of Russia
articles.title_raw: ЦБ работает на устойчивый рост экономики, стремясь обеспечить низкую инфляцию
articles.lead_raw: Высокий уровень инфляции свидетельствует о том, что экономика развивается слишком быстро, используя свои производственные и трудовые ресурсы на пределе возможностей, отмечает Банк России

articles.title_en: VTB: the car loan market in the Russian Federation has grown by 40% in four months
articles.lead_en: The figure amounted to more than 548.5 billion rubles
articles.title_raw: ВТБ: рынок автокредитования в РФ за четыре месяца вырос на 40%

articles.title_en: Expert Lipina assessed the risk of growing budget deficits in the Russian Arctic regions
articles.lead_en: Without taking comprehensive measures to strengthen the revenue base and optimize costs, the risk in 2026-2027 will remain significant, according to the Deputy Chairman of the VAVT SOPS of the Russian Ministry of Economic Development, Deputy Chairman of the Public Council under t
articles.title_raw: Эксперт Липина оценила риск роста дефицитов бюджетов регионов АЗРФ
articles.lead_raw: Без принятия комплексных мер по укреплению доходной базы и оптимизации расходов риск в 2026-2027 годах останется существенным, считает зампредседателя СОПС ВАВТ Минэкономразвития России, зампредседателя Общественного совета при Минприроды России, советник директора ВНИИ Экология

articles.title_en: More than 2.4 thousand companies with Russian participation are registered in Serbia
articles.lead_en: The Serbian Minister responsible for international economic cooperation, Nenad Popovic, noted that specialists from the two countries can jointly participate in international projects and competitions, which contributes to the development of innovation and strengthening competiti
articles.title_raw: В Сербии зарегистрировано более 2,4 тыс. компаний с участием России
articles.lead_raw: Сербский министр, отвечающий за международное экономическое сотрудничество, Ненад Попович отметил, что специалисты двух стран могут совместно участвовать в международных проектах и конкурсах, что способствует развитию инноваций и укреплению конкурентоспособности на мировом рынке
